name: dbw-base
description: Vinosphäre Schropp – GeneratePress child theme by dbw media

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix core/blocks && npm install --prefix blocks
scripts.build:core-blocks: node core/scripts/generate-tokens.js && npm run build --prefix core/blocks
scripts.build:theme-blocks: node core/scripts/generate-tokens.js && npm run build --prefix blocks
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:core-blocks && npm run build:theme-blocks
scripts.dev:core-blocks: node core/scripts/generate-tokens.js && npm run start --prefix core/blocks
scripts.dev:theme-blocks: node core/scripts/generate-tokens.js && npm run start --prefix blocks

author: dbw media <info@dbw-media.de>
